channel.title: GitHub Nunjucks Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Nunjucks in GitHub

item.title: h5bp/Front-end-Developer-Interview-Questions
item.description: A list of helpful front-end related questions you can use to interview potential candidates, test yourself or completely ignore.

item.title: phuoc-ng/html-dom
item.description: Common tasks of managing HTML DOM with vanilla JavaScript. Give me 1 ⭐if it’s useful.

item.title: 11ty/eleventy-base-blog
item.description: A starter repository for a blog web site using the Eleventy static site generator.

item.title: a11yproject/a11yproject.com
item.description: The A11Y Project is a community-driven effort to make digital accessibility easier.
